project: NEST Advisors — Institutional Bond Command Platform
ceo: Sean Gilmore (18yr JPMorgan — top banker 11x nationally)

fonts.data: IBM Plex Mono (mono — ALL financial figures)

brand.design_philosophy: Bloomberg Terminal × Spider-Verse — cinematic dark institutional, neon dimensional accents, dense financial data. Every item has on/off glow state — active items shine bright with colored drop-shadows, inactive items dim but remain visible. Negative space darkens around off items, not the item itself.
brand.hero: NEST King chess piece / tree mark (NestMark.tsx — 4x4 lattice with gold conifer triangles, always centered prominently)
brand.voice: Jimmy Lee (JPMorgan legend) — direct, decisive, no hedging, no passive voice

three_tiers.tier1_low: Power Strip Plugin Hub — universal API router (ai_router.py). 10 plugins: Claude, Claude Direct, DeepSeek, Grok, OpenAI, Bloomberg, Moody's, S&P, Meshy, Higgsfield. Retry with exponential backoff, health tracking, priority-based fallback chains.
three_tiers.tier2_mid: NEST Modules — 15 agents + 6 calculation engines + all pillar services consume the Power Strip
three_tiers.tier3_high: Backend → Frontend via REST API (api.ts client + trpc.ts React Query hooks)

data.ai_scout: Fires AI to find deals by NAICS + state filter, returns narrative results

roots.purpose: ALL pre-bond arrangement work — document vault, project readiness, surety prep, audit, feasibility, RMA spreads, credit memo, ESG

document_vault.design_note: Each item is a toggle button. Uploaded = emerald glow + checkmark. Review = amber glow + warning. Missing = dim with no glow. Required items show red 'required' badge when missing.

project_readiness.design_note: Same on/off toggle pattern. Completed items glow emerald. Progress bar at top.

credit_memo.inputs: Deal parameters (NOI, tranches, coupons, TPC, appraised value, equity, EBITDA)

bond_desk.purpose: ALL things once it IS a bond — live trading floor. Structuring, monitoring, covenants, call/put, real-time MTM.

data.design_note: This should feel like a Bloomberg terminal or a trader's desk. Dense data, live-updating feel, dark with neon accents. Numbers in IBM Plex Mono gold.

hawkeye.purpose: ALL things sales & placement — institutional buyer matching, AI teasers, order book, allocation

matching.algorithm: sector (40pts) + yield clearance (25pts) + rating comfort (20pts) + ticket fit (10pts) + relationship bonus (5pts)

order_book.allocation: Prioritize existing relationships, then largest indications. Returns coverage_pct.

data.ai_teaser: Full 200-word institutional investor teaser generated via Power Strip

nightvision.purpose: Compliance lair — monitors entire process end-to-end

atticus.purpose: In-house counsel — legal compliance, covenant review, bond counsel memos

bernard.purpose: AI analyst concierge — floating on every page, action engine not chatbot
bernard.personality: Charlie Hunnam / Jax Teller — English geezer, bit rude, backhanded compliments, treats you like you're thick but secretly knows you're brilliant. Brainstorming superagent. Encouraging through tough love.
bernard.design_note: Floating gold button bottom-right (NEST chess piece icon). Expands to chat panel. Dark panel with amber/gold accents.

duckling_agent_flow.purpose: Mr. Beeks — animated Spider-Verse/Matrix power plant showing all agents feeding the NEST King
duckling_agent_flow.center: Mr. Beeks (NestMark chess piece) — glows brighter as agents complete, full golden glow when all online
duckling_agent_flow.animation: Sequential agent activation with colored glows, energy pulse rings from center, each agent chip scales when running

backend_routes_summary./api/powerstrip/*: 7 routes — plugin status, routing, market rates, bond pricing, refi signals
backend_routes_summary./api/bond-workflow/*: 4 routes — workflow state, AI evaluation, checklist, phase management
backend_routes_summary./api/eagleeye/*: 7 routes — signals CRUD, AI scout, convert to deal, stats
backend_routes_summary./api/hawkeye/*: 7 routes — buyers, matching, teasers, order book, indications, allocation
backend_routes_summary./api/rating-esg/*: 8 routes — rating assess/compare, ESG score, climate, covenants, trustee, RMA
backend_routes_summary./api/engines/*: 20+ routes — modeling, maxwell, architect, pricing, sentinel, insurance, intake, audit, bridge, pipeline
backend_routes_summary./api/deals/*: 8 routes — CRUD, bonds, checklist, covenants, memos, refi
backend_routes_summary./api/fund/*: 6 routes — snapshot, simulate, distributions, yield, benchmark

frontend_components.master_hub: BondCommandCenter.tsx — 10-tab layout with NEST King hero
pillars: EagleEyeScoutDashboard.tsx — M&A + Real Estate + AI Scout
RootsWorkspace.tsx — Doc vault, readiness, surety, RMA, credit memo, ESG
StructuringStudio.tsx — Bond desk structuring + stress + rating
HawkeyePlacementScout.tsx — Buyer matching, teasers, order book
supporting: DucklingAgentFlow.tsx — Mr. Beeks animated agent power plant
BondStackDesk.tsx — Original bond tranche UI (still used in operations)
NestMark.tsx — King chess piece / tree SVG component

agents.name: Apex
agents.role: Hedge desk (TLT puts, T-note futures, IRS)

design_upgrade_brief.overall: 5K Spider-Verse / Bloomberg terminal cinematic. Every module needs the on/off glow treatment — active items have colored drop-shadows and bright borders, inactive items dim to near-invisible but the item itself (text, icon) stays readable. Think power plant where each machine lights up when online.
design_upgrade_brief.eagleeye: Deal sourcing war room. Signal cards with heat-map scoring (red=hot, amber=warm, dim=review). M&A signals with EDGAR filing icons. Real estate signals with building/permit icons. AI scout results in terminal-style output.
design_upgrade_brief.roots: Document vault = file cabinet with glowing drawers. Each doc is a toggle card that illuminates when uploaded. Readiness checklist = mission control pre-flight. Progress bars everywhere. Surety section = insurance firm aesthetic.
design_upgrade_brief.bond_desk: FULL Bloomberg terminal. Dense, dark, data-heavy. Live ticker feel. Numbers in gold IBM Plex Mono. Stress test results as colored status bars. Rating comparison as institutional table. Should feel like you're sitting at a trading desk.
design_upgrade_brief.hawkeye: Sales floor energy. Buyer cards with match scores as circular gauges. Order book as a live table with running totals. Allocation waterfall visualization. Teaser output as a formatted document preview.
design_upgrade_brief.nightvision: Green-on-black hacker aesthetic. Matrix vibes. Compliance checks as terminal lines with PASS/FAIL badges. Overall score as a large circular gauge.
design_upgrade_brief.atticus: Law office meets terminal. Legal checklist as formal document-style cards. Covenant monitor as institutional data table. Legal memo as formatted document.
design_upgrade_brief.bernard: Floating glass panel with subtle amber glow. Chat bubbles are dark with thin gold borders. Typing indicator is a pulsing amber dot. Suggested prompts as small capsule buttons.
design_upgrade_brief.mr_beeks: The centerpiece. NEST King chess piece at center with radiating energy rings. Agents orbit in two rings. When pipeline runs, energy visibly flows from outer ring → inner ring → Beeks. Full golden supernova when all agents complete.
design_upgrade_brief.king_hero: Always prominently centered at top of BondCommandCenter. Large (88px+). Golden glow shadow. 'NEST ADVISORS' in Cormorant Garamond below. Arden Edge Capital × Soparrow Capital subtitle.

known_issues.jwt_config: JWT_TOKEN_LOCATION was missing — added to config.py but needs server restart to take effect. Server process caching may require full kill/restart.
known_issues.bond_desk_thin: StructuringStudio needs expansion — covenant monitoring, call/put signals, live MTM, Bloomberg terminal density
known_issues.hawkeye_deeper: Needs Sterling CRM integration, Aria outreach sequences, book building waterfall viz
known_issues.cinematic_glow: On/off toggle lighting not yet implemented across all modules — design pass needed
